summary: Iteration 2 full-stack test complete. Backend: 40/40 pytest pass covering new 8-field Applications schema (old schema correctly rejected with 422), Visits, Analytics shape, Drive files CRUD (upload/list/day-filter/dates-aggregate/download-with-?auth=token/moderator-own-only-delete/admin-delete-any), Drive sheets CRUD with default 8x5 shape and cell-length clamping, Settings seeded to https://discord.gg/QKTpvNsfu7, and role-based access. Frontend: landing page renders EST. 2026 caption, footer © CODEX, Основано 2026 + Глав 2 hero stats, all 5 new roster names (Theo/Butcher/Eva/Bushido/Owner Codex), Тени Redwood territory, no nav-admin button, Discord CTA href = https://discord.gg/QKTpvNsfu7. m+d hotkey on / navigates to /admin. AdminLogin shows 'Только для высших рангов.' 8-field application form submits successfully (toast shown). Admin dashboard shows all 5 tabs (applications/drive/analytics/moderators/settings). Moderator correctly sees only 3 tabs (applications/drive/analytics). Drive tab: file upload works and appears in list, calendar toggle reveals wrap, sheets new-button → inline name input → create works, open-sheet opens modal editor with 8x5 drive-cell-{r}-{c} grid + add-row/add-col/save buttons. Analytics panel loads all KPIs + 7-day chart + applications breakdown + moderator leaderboard.

design_issues.screen: Drive → sheet editor modal & AdminDashboard dialogs
issues: Radix DialogContent still missing DialogDescription/aria-describedby (a11y warning in console — carried over from iteration 1, purely cosmetic)

action_items: (Optional a11y) Add <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to Radix DialogContent instances (sheet editor, add-moderator dialog) to silence console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: ApplicationCreate Pydantic model correctly enforces min_length/max_length/age range — 422 on old static_id/reason/rp_experience payloads verified.
Drive upload excludes storage_path from response and list projection — verified. Good.

Download endpoint supports both Authorization: Bearer and ?auth=<jwt> query fallback for direct <a href> downloads — verified streams bytes with Content-Disposition: attachment; filename*=UTF-8''… (RFC 5987).
DELETE /api/drive/files scopes by uploader_id for non-admins — moderator gets 404 for another user's file; admin can delete any. Verified.
Sheet PATCH server-side clamps to 500 chars/cell, 500 rows, 50 cols, 26 columns — cell clamp verified.
seed_settings upgrades existing non-https/missing discord_url to DEFAULT_DISCORD_URL on startup — good self-heal.
Analytics /api/analytics accessible by both admin and moderator (via get_current_user, not require_admin) — intentional since moderators see the analytics tab.
init_storage() lazy-init pattern is fine; failures raise 500 'Хранилище недоступно' and we got successful uploads during testing, so EMERGENT_LLM_KEY works.
Minor: /api/drive/files/dates aggregates only non-deleted files — correct, matches UI calendar dot behavior.

Minor: POST /api/moderators returns 400 for password <3 chars BEFORE checking duplicates — acceptable but error ordering could leak existence of username if someone probes with short password; not a real security issue.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py (rewritten for iteration 2 — 40 tests covering new 8-field applications, visits, analytics, drive files, drive sheets, role checks)
test_credentials: admin alex/123 (seeded). Moderators created dynamically and cleaned up in fixture teardown.
seed_data_creation: Tests create TEST_ prefixed applications/sheets/files. File uploads and sheet creation produce TEST_UI_Sheet_* entries; admin cleanup removes them where tests exercise delete, but some remain in DB (harmless, visible only on admin dashboard).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py finishes in ~10s (40 tests). Object storage via https://integrations.emergentagent.com/objstore is live and working — upload tests are gated by a _storage_available(admin_headers) probe that skips cleanly if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY init fails. Sheet editor uses a modal (role='dialog'), so to interact with drive-cell-{r}-{c}, first click drive-open-sheet-{id} then wait ~1.2s for the modal; the 8x5 default renders 40 cells. Sheet CREATE flow requires clicking drive-new-sheet-btn FIRST to reveal the drive-new-sheet-name input, then drive-create-sheet-btn. DrivePanel uses window.confirm() for delete (use page.on('dialog', lambda d: asyncio.create_task(d.accept()))). Settings test puts a temp URL then restores EXPECTED_DISCORD so ordering with other tests is safe.
rca of the issue: No blocking bugs. The only residual item is a pre-existing Radix a11y warning already noted in iteration 1.
